empty.real: No real-balance transactions yet. Make a PIX deposit to get started.
empty.game: No game-balance transactions yet. Send money from your real balance when you want to use it in games.
empty.sandbox: No sandbox-credit transactions yet. Buy credits with your game balance when you want to use them.

game.label: Game balance
game.subtitle: Real money set aside for games. To withdraw it, return it to your real balance first — you can do that anytime, with no fee.

sandbox.label: Sandbox credits
sandbox.subtitle: Virtual currency for matches, bought with your game balance. It has no monetary value and can't be withdrawn or converted back.

balance.activateLink: Going to use the wallet for games? Activate the game wallet.

deposit.title: Deposit via PIX
deposit.description: We generate a PIX code for you to pay in your bank app.

withdraw.title: Withdraw to PIX
withdraw.description: The withdrawal fee is deducted from your balance along with the amount.
withdraw.pixDestination: The PIX will be sent to the CPF registered on your account. You must already have a PIX key registered for it at your bank.

credits.title: Buy sandbox credits
credits.description: Debited from your game balance. Sandbox credits never become money again.

fundGame.title: Send to the game wallet
fundGame.description: It stays your money: you can return it to your real balance whenever you want. Your game limits apply here.

returnGame.title: Return to real balance
returnGame.description: No fee and no limit — moving money out of the game wallet is always allowed.

error.overWithdrawable: Including the fee, the maximum available to withdraw is {{amount}}.

withdraw.title: Confirm withdrawal
withdraw.description: Review the amount and fee before the money leaves your balance.

fundGame.title: Confirm transfer to games
fundGame.description: This move counts toward your game limit. Returning money later does not free it up again.

returnGame.title: Confirm return to real balance
returnGame.description: No fee and no limit — money leaving the game wallet is always allowed.

stepUp.title: Identity check required
stepUp.description: For your security, withdrawals require a recent MFA check. Re-verify your identity to continue.

pix.title: Pay {{amount}} via PIX
pix.description: Copy the code and pay in your bank app. The balance updates as soon as the bank confirms the payment.
pix.expired: This PIX code has expired. Close this window and start a new deposit.

transactions.title: Transaction status
transactions.description: Updates are tied to the reference below and remain visible after a refresh.

guidance.processing: The debit is already reflected in your balance while the bank confirms the PIX. If it cannot be completed, the amount and fee are returned automatically. You can close this page safely.
guidance.refund_failed: The PIX was not completed and the automatic refund still needs reconciliation. Our team has been notified; keep the reference above if you contact support.

toast.withdrawProcessing: Withdrawal submitted and awaiting bank confirmation.
toast.withdrawReversed: Withdrawal could not be completed — the amount was refunded to your balance.
toast.withdrawRefundFailed: Withdrawal failed and the refund is pending. Our team has been notified.
toast.fundGameSent: Balance sent to the game wallet.

terms.title: Just one more step
terms.description: Before accessing your real balance and PIX activity, read and accept the CTech Wallet Additional Terms.
terms.error: We couldn't confirm. Please try again.
terms.checkboxPrefix: I have read and agree with the
terms.lookupErrorTitle: We couldn't verify your terms status
terms.lookupErrorDescription: For your protection, the wallet remains unavailable until we can confirm that you accepted the current Additional Terms. Your balances and money are unchanged.

gambling.title: Activate the game wallet
gambling.description: We create a separate wallet for games. The money in it stays yours and returns to your real balance whenever you want — no fee and no limit.
gambling.bullet1: It is the only door to games: you can't play directly from your real balance.
gambling.bullet2: Your limits apply when sending to the game wallet. Returning money does not free up limit again.
gambling.bullet3: Sandbox credits have no monetary value and never become money again.
gambling.checkboxPrefix: I have read and agree with the
gambling.limitsDescription: Choose how much you can send to games per day, week, and month.

error.kycNotVerified: Verify your identity in your CTech account before activating the game wallet.
error.termsRequired: Accept the responsible gaming terms to continue.
error.generic: We couldn't activate. Please try again.

responsible.title: Responsible gaming
responsible.description: Review and adjust your limits or take a break from real-money gaming.

limits.title: Game deposit limits
limits.description: They count every transfer from real balance to game balance. Returns do not restore headroom.
limits.coherence: Use values above zero, with daily no greater than weekly and weekly no greater than monthly.
limits.cooldown: Increases take effect in 7 days; monthly increases take effect in 14 days. Reductions are immediate.

exclusion.title: Self-exclusion
exclusion.description: Blocks new real-money deposits and play. You can still return your game balance and use sandbox credits.
exclusion.periodLabel: Choose how long to block real-money gaming
exclusion.confirm: Selected duration: {{period}}. Self-exclusion starts immediately and cannot end early. Type {{phrase}} to confirm.
exclusion.confirmationHint: Type {{phrase}}. Letter case does not matter.
exclusion.error: We couldn't activate self-exclusion. Your settings have not changed. Try again.
exclusion.until: Real-money deposits and play are blocked until {{date}}.
exclusion.indefinite: Real-money deposits and play are blocked indefinitely.
exclusion.helpDescription: These independent support services are available before or after you start self-exclusion.

v2.metaDescription: Additional terms applicable to the use of the CTech Wallet.
v2.title: Additional Terms — CTech Wallet

s1.heading: 1. About the CTech Wallet
s1.p1: The CTech Wallet is a feature of the CTech platform intended for managing credits and transactions related to the services provided by CTech.
s1.p2: The Wallet is not a bank account, payment account, financial investment, bank deposit, or regulated investment product.
s1.p3: The amounts held in the Wallet represent credits owed by the CTech platform for use in the services provided.
s1.p4: The funds held in the Wallet are not covered by the Credit Guarantee Fund (FGC).

s2.heading: 2. Eligibility
s2.p1: To use features involving real money, the following is required:
s2.li1: being 18 (eighteen) years of age or older;
s2.p2: CTech may request additional documents at any time, including for registry updates or fraud prevention.

s3.heading: 3. Wallet structure
s3.p1: The Wallet may hold logically segregated balances, including:
s3.li1: intended for services and financial transactions.
s3.li2: intended exclusively for integrated gaming activities.
s3.li3: virtual currency with no economic value.

s4.heading: 4. Deposits
s4.p1: Deposits are made exclusively through the PIX system, using partner financial institutions.
s4.p2: The credit is posted only after the responsible financial institution effectively confirms settlement of the transaction.
s4.p3: CTech may refuse, cancel, or reverse deposits when:
s4.li1: the payer's CPF differs from the verified CPF;
s4.li3: there is a legal or regulatory determination;

s5.heading: 5. Withdrawals
s5.p1: Withdrawals may be made exclusively to PIX keys belonging to the same verified CPF on the account.
s5.p2: Withdrawal requests are processed instantly whenever possible, depending on the availability of:
s5.li3: the Central Bank of Brazil's infrastructure.
s5.p3: Any unavailability may cause processing delays.

s6.heading: 6. Fees
s6.p1: Use of certain features may be subject to operational fees.
s6.p2: All applicable fees will be disclosed to the user before the operation is confirmed.

s7.heading: 7. Fraud prevention and AML
s7.p1: CTech may adopt measures to prevent fraud, money laundering, terrorist financing, and misuse of the platform.
s7.p2: To that end, measures such as the following may be adopted:
s7.li6: temporary retention of funds for analysis.
s7.p3: If reasonable indications of fraud or unlawful activity are identified, CTech may notify the competent authorities and adopt the appropriate measures.

s8.heading: 8. Account closure
s8.p1: Closure of the Wallet may occur only after the existing balances have been fully settled.
s8.p2: While there is available balance or pending operations, the account may remain active exclusively for regularization purposes.

s9.heading: 9. Sandbox Credits
s9.p1: Sandbox credits are exclusively virtual in nature.
s9.p3: The acquisition of sandbox credits is final and irrevocable.

s10.heading: 10. Service availability
s10.p1: The Wallet depends on services provided by third parties, including financial institutions and PIX infrastructure.
s10.p2: CTech does not guarantee uninterrupted availability of these services and is not responsible for failures, unavailability, or delays caused by third parties.

s11.heading: 11. Limitation of liability
s11.p1: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, CTech shall not be liable for:
s11.p2: Nothing in this document limits the indefeasible rights provided for in Brazilian law.

s12.heading: 12. Changes
s12.p1: This document may be changed periodically.
s12.p2: Material changes will require renewed acceptance by the user before continued use of the Wallet.

v1.metaDescription: CTech Wallet Additional Terms — real balance via PIX and sandbox credits.
v1.title: Additional Terms — CTech Wallet
v1.intro1: This addendum complements — and does not replace — the
v1.intro3: of CTech. Where specific to the digital wallet, this addendum prevails.

s1.heading: 1. What the CTech Wallet is
s1.p1a: The CTech Wallet holds two separate balances in your account: the
s1.p1c: , a virtual currency used in integrated applications.

s2.heading: 2. Who can use it
s2.p1: To move real balance you need to be 18 or older and complete the identity verification of your CTech account. To withdraw, the destination PIX key must belong to the same verified CPF on the account — withdrawals to third-party keys are refused.

s3.heading: 3. Deposits
s3.p1: Deposits are received via PIX. The amount enters the wallet only after the partner bank confirms the payment — never based on a notification alone. If the payer's CPF differs from the verified CPF on your account, the deposit is refused and automatically returned to the payer.

s4.heading: 4. Withdrawals and fee
s4.p1: Each withdrawal has a fee, deducted from your balance along with the withdrawn amount. The default fee is 2% of the amount, with a minimum of R$1.00 and a maximum of R$10.00 per operation, and covers the cost of the PIX transfer. The fee applied to your wallet is always shown before you confirm the withdrawal.
s4.p2: A wallet runs one operation at a time: a new withdrawal only starts after the previous one is completed.

s5.heading: 5. Sandbox credits
s5.p1: Sandbox credits can be bought with real balance or granted by integrated applications. They are used to take part in matches in integrated skill games.
s5.p2: Sandbox credits have no monetary value, are not redeemable, and can under no circumstance be converted into real balance or withdrawn. Buying credits with real balance is final and non-refundable.

s6.heading: 6. Limits of liability
s6.p1: The CTech Wallet is not a financial institution licensed by the Central Bank of Brazil. It acts as a technical intermediary for the custody and movement of funds via PIX, through a partner bank. We do not guarantee the uninterrupted availability of third-party PIX infrastructure and are not liable for delays or failures caused by it.

s7.heading: 7. Changes
s7.p1: This addendum may be updated. Material changes require renewed explicit acceptance before you continue using the wallet.

s8.heading: 8. Contact
s8.p1a: O CARVALHO TECH — CNPJ 62.787.449/0001-07. Data Protection Officer (DPO):

v2.metaDescription: Terms applicable to the use of the game wallet and participation in games integrated with the CTech platform.
v2.title: Responsible Gaming Terms — CTech Wallet
v2.intro2: and applies exclusively to users who choose to activate features related to games.

s1.heading: 1. Optional activation
s1.p1: Use of game-related features is entirely optional.
s1.p2: Users who use the CTech Wallet exclusively for subscriptions, payments, or other platform services do not need to activate the game wallet.
s1.li2: an active account on the platform;

s2.heading: 2. Game wallet
s2.p1: The game wallet is a logical segregation of the balance intended exclusively for participation in games integrated with the platform.
s2.p2: The money held in the game wallet remains the user's property and may be transferred back to the real balance at any time, subject to legal, operational, or fraud-prevention restrictions.
s2.p3: No game may debit the user's real balance directly.
s2.p4: All transfers to the game wallet require explicit user action.

s3.heading: 3. Personal limits
s3.p1: The user may set voluntary limits for the movement of funds intended for games, including:
s3.p2: The limits must respect a logical consistency among themselves: the daily limit may not exceed the weekly limit, nor the weekly limit the monthly limit.
s3.p3: Reductions of limits take effect immediately.
s3.p4: Increases of limits are subject to a waiting period ("cooldown"), intended to protect the user and promote responsible gaming.
s3.p5: Returning funds from the game wallet to the real balance does not restore already consumed limits.

s4.heading: 4. Self-exclusion and voluntary pauses
s4.p1: The user may start self-exclusion for:
s4.p2: During self-exclusion, real-money play and transfers to the game wallet are blocked. Fixed periods cannot end early. An indefinite exclusion can only be revoked after at least 90 days.

s5.heading: 5. Sandbox Credits
s5.p1: The platform may make sandbox credits available for use in recreational or experimental modalities.
s5.li3: grant no right to cash prizes;
s5.li4: cannot be converted into real balance;

s6.heading: 6. Prohibited conduct
s6.li1: using the platform while a minor;
s6.li2: allowing third parties to use the account;

s7.heading: 7. Security measures
s7.p1: CTech may adopt measures to protect the integrity of matches and prevent fraud, including:
s7.li5: temporary retention of funds for analysis.
s7.p2: Where there are reasonable indications of fraud, abuse, or breach of this term, CTech may block accounts and cancel matches, without prejudice to the user's right to defense.

s8.heading: 8. Returning funds and stopping play
s8.p1: Money in the game wallet can be returned to the real balance at any time, without a fee or a game limit, subject to security and fraud-prevention checks.
s8.p2: To stop real-money gaming, the user can start self-exclusion from the Responsible Gaming page under the conditions in section 4. The platform does not currently offer deactivation or deletion of the game wallet.

s9.heading: 9. Play responsibly
s9.p1: Games involving financial resources may cause addiction and must be used responsibly.
s9.p2: Never use funds intended for essential expenses, take on financial commitments because of games, or try to recover losses through new bets.
s9.p3: If the activity ceases to be recreational, seeking specialized help is recommended.

s10.heading: 10. Nature of the games
s10.p1: The games made available by the platform may have their own rules and specific terms.
s10.p2: Participation in any modality presupposes acceptance of the respective applicable rules.
s10.p3: CTech may change, suspend, or discontinue game modalities at any time, subject to any applicable legal obligations.

s11.heading: 11. Changes
s11.p1: This document may be updated periodically.
s11.p2: Material changes will require renewed acceptance before continued use of the game-related features.

v1.metaDescription: CTech Wallet Responsible Gaming Terms — game wallet, personal limits, and sandbox credits.
v1.title: Responsible Gaming Terms — CTech Wallet
v1.intro1Bold: specific to using the wallet for games
v1.intro1d: mean accepting this term: they are separate documents, and you only need this one if you want to use the wallet for games.

s1.heading: 1. The game wallet
s1.p1a: When you activate, we create a
s1.p1b: separate from your real balance. The money in the game wallet
s1.p1c: : you can return it to your real balance whenever you want, with no fee and no limit, and withdraw it from there via PIX normally.
s1.p2: The game wallet exists to separate what you chose to devote to games from the money you use for subscriptions and services. It is the
s1.p2b: door through which real money reaches the games: you cannot play or buy credits directly from the real balance.

s2.heading: 2. Personal limits
s2.p1Bold: how much you can transfer from your real balance to the game wallet
s2.p1b: per day, per week, and per month. The daily limit may not be larger than the weekly limit, and the weekly limit may not be larger than the monthly limit.
s2.p2b: in the period. Returning money from the game wallet to the real balance does
s2.p2c: free up limit again — otherwise the limit would limit nothing.
s2.p3: Reducing a limit takes effect immediately. Increasing a limit only takes effect after a waiting period: 7 days for the daily and weekly limits, 14 days for the monthly limit. We never make you wait to protect yourself more.

s3.heading: 3. Sandbox credits
s3.p1a: Sandbox credits are bought with the balance of the
s3.p1b: and are used to take part in matches in integrated skill games.
s3.p2: Sandbox credits have no monetary value, cannot be withdrawn, and cannot be converted back into money — not to the game wallet, not to the real balance. The conversion is final.

s4.heading: 4. Who can activate
s4.p1: You must be 18 or older and have completed the identity verification of your CTech account. Activation is optional: if you use the wallet only for subscriptions and services, you don't need it and nothing related to games appears in your wallet.

s5.heading: 5. Play responsibly
s5.p1: Games with money can cause addiction. Bet only what you can afford to lose, and use the limits — that is what they are for.
s5.p2a: If the game has stopped being fun, seek help. In Brazil, the CVV is available 24 hours by phone
